'''shafuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaeototaxy|chaeototaxy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaeototaxy|chaeototaxy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shafuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæfijith|shæfijith]] || [[word:shæfijij|shæfijij]] || [[word:shæfijish|shæfijish]] || [[word:shæfiji|shæfiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shafufujuth|shafufujuth]] || [[word:shafufujuj|shafufujuj]] || [[word:shafufujush|shafufujush]] || [[word:shafufuju|shafufuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shafujuth|shafujuth]] || [[word:shafujuj|shafujuj]] || [[word:shafujush|shafujush]] || [[word:shafuju|shafuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shafufjuth|shafufjuth]] || [[word:shafufjuj|shafufjuj]] || [[word:shafufjush|shafufjush]] || [[word:shafufjuf|shafufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shafujuthu|shafujuthu]] || [[word:shafujuju|shafujuju]] || [[word:shafujushu|shafujushu]] || [[word:shafujuku|shafujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shafujuth|shafujuth]] || [[word:shafujuj|shafujuj]] || [[word:shafujush|shafujush]] || [[word:shafuju|shafuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shafujuthul|shafujuthul]] || [[word:shafujujul|shafujujul]] || [[word:shafujushul|shafujushul]] || [[word:shafujukul|shafujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shafujuthuthu|shafujuthuthu]] || [[word:shafujujuju|shafujujuju]] || [[word:shafujushushu|shafujushushu]] || [[word:shafujuku|shafujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shafujuthun|shafujuthun]] || [[word:shafujujun|shafujujun]] || [[word:shafujushun|shafujushun]] || [[word:shafujukun|shafujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shafujuthuoro|shafujuthuoro]] || [[word:shafujujuoro|shafujujuoro]] || [[word:shafujushuoro|shafujushuoro]] || [[word:shafujukuoro|shafujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
